---
title: "OBDD Figure 1 Script"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r fig.width=12, fig.asp=1}
# Install necessary packages if not already installed
packages <- c("ape", "ggtree", "ggplot2", "cowplot", "reshape2", "FossilSim")
installed_packages <- rownames(installed.packages())
for (pkg in packages) {
  if (!pkg %in% installed_packages)
    install.packages(pkg)
}

# Load packages
library(ape)
library(ggtree)
library(ggplot2)
library(cowplot)
library(reshape2)
library(FossilSim)
```

```{r fig.width=8, fig.asp=0.8}
# Set seed for reproducibility
set.seed(123)

# Simulate a phylogenetic tree
tree <- rtree(n = 4)

# Function to simulate diffusing rates along branches as Brownian motion
simulate_rates_bm <- function(tree, rate_initial, sigma, alpha, rate_name) {
  # Get the node ages
  node_ages <- node.depth.edgelength(tree)
  max_age <- max(node_ages)
  
  # Prepare data frame to store rates
  rate_data <- data.frame()
  
  # Recursive function to traverse the tree and simulate rates
  traverse_tree <- function(node, parent_rate, current_time) {
    # Get children of the current node
    children <- which(tree$edge[,1] == node)
    
    if (length(children) == 0) {
      # Tip node
      return()
    }
    
    for (child_edge in children) {
      child_node <- tree$edge[child_edge, 2]
      branch_length <- tree$edge.length[child_edge]
      dt <- 0.001
      times <- seq(0, branch_length, length.out=branch_length/dt)
      rates <- numeric(length(times))
      rates[1] <- parent_rate
      for (i in 2:length(times)) {
        rates[i] <- rates[i-1] + rnorm(1, mean = 0, sd = sigma * sqrt(dt)) + alpha*dt
      }
      # Store the rates along the branch
      branch_times <- current_time + times
      rate_data <<- rbind(rate_data, data.frame(time = branch_times, rate = rates, lineage = child_node))
      # Recurse into child node
      traverse_tree(child_node, rates[length(rates)], current_time + branch_length)
    }
  }
  
  # Start traversal from the root
  root_node <- Ntip(tree) + 1
  traverse_tree(root_node, rate_initial, current_time = 0)
  
  rate_data$variable <- rate_name
  rate_data$rate <- exp(rate_data$rate)  # geometric Brownnian motion
  return(rate_data)
}

# Simulate speciation rates as Brownian motion
speciation_rates <- simulate_rates_bm(tree, rate_initial = -0.5, sigma = 0.5, alpha=-1.5, rate_name = "Speciation")

# Simulate extinction rates as Brownian motion
extinction_rates <- simulate_rates_bm(tree, rate_initial = -1.5, sigma = 0.5, alpha=0.2, rate_name = "Extinction")

# Combine rate data
rate_data <- rbind(speciation_rates, extinction_rates)

# Simulate piecewise-constant fossil sampling and occurrence sampling rates
max_time <- max(node.depth.edgelength(tree))

time_bins <- c(max_time, max_time*2/3, max_time/3, 0)
sampling_rates <- data.frame(
  time = time_bins,
  occurrence_sampling_rate = c(50, 50, 7, 160),
  fossil_sampling_rate = c(5, 5, 0.5, 4)
)

# Sample fossils
fossils <- sim.fossils.intervals(tree=tree, interval.ages = rev(time_bins), rates = rev(sampling_rates$fossil_sampling_rate[-1]))
occurrences <- sim.fossils.intervals(tree=tree, interval.ages = rev(time_bins), rates = rev(sampling_rates$occurrence_sampling_rate[-1]))

# Melt data for plotting
sampling_rates_melt <- melt(sampling_rates, id.vars = "time")

# Combine rate data for plotting
speciation_rates$variable <- "Speciation"
extinction_rates$variable <- "Extinction"
combined_rates <- rbind(speciation_rates, extinction_rates)

# Plot combined rates over time with specified colors
p_rates <- ggplot(combined_rates, aes(
    x = max_time-time,
    y = rate,
    color = variable,
    #alpha = rate,
    group = interaction(lineage, variable)
  )) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.5, lineend = "round") +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("Speciation" = "darkgreen", "Extinction" = "darkred")
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Time",
    y = "Diversification Rates",
    #title = "Speciation and Extinction Rates Over Time",
    color = ""
  ) +
  scale_x_reverse() +
  guides(alpha = "none", colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(linewidth=2))) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
        legend.position = c(0.83,0.38),
        axis.line.x=element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x=element_blank(),
        axis.text.x=element_blank(),
        axis.title.x=element_blank())

# Plot sampling rates over time
p_sampling <- ggplot(sampling_rates_melt, aes(x = time, y = value, color = variable)) +
  geom_step(linewidth = 2, direction = "vh", lineend = "round") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("orange3", "orange4"), labels = c("Occurrences", "Phylogenetic\nFossils")) +
  labs(x = "Time", y = "Sampling Rates", color = "") +
  scale_y_log10() +
  scale_x_reverse() +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
        legend.position = c(0.85,0.73),
        legend.background=element_blank(),
        axis.line.x=element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x=element_blank(),
        axis.text.x=element_blank())

# Combine the tree and the combined rates plot
par(omd = c(0, 1, 0.3, 1))
plot(fossils, tree, fossil.col = "orange4", cex = 2, extant.col = "transparent", show.axis = T)
par(new = TRUE, mar = c(0.5, 4, 4, 2) + 0.1, omd = c(0, 1, 0, 0.4))
plot(occurrences$hmin, rnorm(nrow(occurrences), 0.0, 0.02), col=alpha("orange3", 0.5), pch=20,
     xlim = c(2.04,-0.09), axes = F, xlab = "", ylab = "")

pdf("Images/OBDD_phylogeny.pdf")
par(omd = c(0, 1, 0.3, 1))
plot(fossils, tree, fossil.col = "orange4", cex = 2, extant.col = "transparent", show.axis = T)
par(new = TRUE, mar = c(0.5, 4, 4, 2) + 0.1, omd = c(0, 1, 0, 0.4))
plot(occurrences$hmin, rnorm(nrow(occurrences), 0.0, 0.02), col=alpha("orange3", 0.5), pch=20,
     xlim = c(2.04,-0.09), axes = F, xlab = "", ylab = "")
dev.off()

p <- plot_grid(
  p_rates,
  p_sampling,
  ncol=1,
  rel_heights = c(2,1),
  align = "v"
)
p
ggsave("Images/OBDD_rates.pdf", p)
```

```{r fig.width=10, fig.asp=0.75, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# ---- deps ----
library(ape)
library(paleotree)
library(ggplot2)
library(reshape2)
library(cowplot)
library(grid)
library(scales)   # for alpha()
library(gridGraphics)

set.seed(123)

# ---- simulation (unchanged core) ----
tree <- rtree(n = 4)

simulate_rates_bm <- function(tree, rate_initial, sigma, alpha, rate_name) {
  node_ages <- node.depth.edgelength(tree)
  max_age <- max(node_ages)
  rate_data <- data.frame()
  traverse_tree <- function(node, parent_rate, current_time) {
    children <- which(tree$edge[,1] == node)
    if (length(children) == 0) return()
    for (child_edge in children) {
      child_node <- tree$edge[child_edge, 2]
      branch_length <- tree$edge.length[child_edge]
      dt <- 0.001
      steps <- max(2L, as.integer(branch_length/dt) + 1L)
      times <- seq(0, branch_length, length.out = steps)
      rates <- numeric(length(times))
      rates[1] <- parent_rate
      for (i in 2:length(times)) {
        rates[i] <- rates[i-1] + rnorm(1, mean = 0, sd = sigma * sqrt(dt)) + alpha*dt
      }
      branch_times <- current_time + times
      rate_data <<- rbind(rate_data, data.frame(time = branch_times, rate = rates, lineage = child_node))
      traverse_tree(child_node, rates[length(rates)], current_time + branch_length)
    }
  }
  root_node <- Ntip(tree) + 1
  traverse_tree(root_node, rate_initial, current_time = 0)
  rate_data$variable <- rate_name
  rate_data$rate <- exp(rate_data$rate)  # geometric BM
  rate_data
}

speciation_rates <- simulate_rates_bm(tree, rate_initial = -0.5, sigma = 0.5, alpha = -1.5, rate_name = "Speciation")
extinction_rates <- simulate_rates_bm(tree, rate_initial = -1.5, sigma = 0.5, alpha = 0.2,  rate_name = "Extinction")

combined_rates <- rbind(speciation_rates, extinction_rates)

max_time <- max(node.depth.edgelength(tree))
time_bins <- c(max_time, max_time*2/3, max_time/3, 0)

sampling_rates <- data.frame(
  time = time_bins,
  occurrence_sampling_rate = c(50, 50, 7, 160),
  fossil_sampling_rate     = c(5,   5,  0.5, 4)
)

# Fossils / occurrences per piecewise-constant bins
fossils <- sim.fossils.intervals(tree = tree,
                                 interval.ages = rev(time_bins),
                                 rates = rev(sampling_rates$fossil_sampling_rate[-1]))
occurrences <- sim.fossils.intervals(tree = tree,
                                     interval.ages = rev(time_bins),
                                     rates = rev(sampling_rates$occurrence_sampling_rate[-1]))

sampling_rates_melt <- melt(sampling_rates, id.vars = "time",
                            variable.name = "variable", value.name = "value")
```


```{r fig.width=12, fig.asp=0.8, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# ---- common axis + typography ----
base_size <- 16
x_limits  <- c(max_time, 0)
x_breaks  <- pretty(c(0, max_time), n = 3)   # works for reversed scales
x_labels  <- format(x_breaks)                 # shared labels

theme_set(
  theme_classic(base_size = base_size) +
    theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = NA),
          plot.background  = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = NA),
          legend.background = element_blank(),
          legend.key        = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = NA))
)

# ---- left column: starting conditions ----

# (L1) Root at start-of-time, on the shared time axis
p_root <- {
  df_root <- data.frame(x = max_time, y = 0)
  ggplot(df_root, aes(x, y)) +
    #geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linewidth = 0.6) +
    geom_point(shape = 21, size = 4.5, stroke = 1.2, fill = "white", color = "black") +
    annotate("text", x = max_time, y = 0, label = "Root", vjust = -1.5, size = 5) +
    scale_x_reverse(limits = x_limits*1.05, breaks = x_breaks, labels = x_labels) +
    labs(x = "Time", y = "Phylogeny with fossils") +
    theme(axis.line.y=element_blank(),
          axis.ticks.y=element_blank(),
          axis.text.y=element_blank(),
          axis.line.x=element_blank(),
          axis.ticks.x=element_blank(),
          axis.text.x=element_blank(),
          axis.title.x=element_blank(),
          panel.background = element_blank())
}

# (L2) Initial λ0, μ0 as circles at t = start-of-time, on the same axis
y_limits <- range(c(combined_rates$rate, exp(c(-0.3, -1.5))), na.rm = TRUE)
p_init_rates <- {
  init_df <- data.frame(
    time     = c(max_time, max_time),
    rate     = exp(c(-0.5, -1.5)),
    variable = c("Speciation", "Extinction"),
    lab      = c("lambda[0]", "mu[0]")
  )
  ggplot(init_df, aes(x = time, y = rate)) +
    geom_point(aes(fill = variable), shape = 21, size = 5, stroke = 1.1, color = "black") +
    geom_text(aes(label = lab), parse = TRUE, vjust = -1.1, size = 5) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("Speciation" = "darkgreen",
                                 "Extinction" = "darkred")) +
    scale_x_reverse(limits = x_limits, breaks = x_breaks, labels = x_labels) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = y_limits) +
    labs(x = "Time", y = "Diversification rates") +
    theme(legend.position = "none",
          axis.line.x=element_blank(),
          axis.ticks.x=element_blank(),
          axis.text.x=element_blank(),
          axis.title.x=element_blank())
}

# (L3) Sampling schedule (piecewise-constant) on the same time axis
p_sampling <- ggplot(sampling_rates_melt, aes(x = time, y = value, color = variable)) +
  geom_step(linewidth = 1.2, direction = "vh", lineend = "round") +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(occurrence_sampling_rate = "orange3",
               fossil_sampling_rate     = "orange4"),
    labels = c("Occurrences", "\nPhylogenetic\nFossils\n")  # << forces extra gap
  ) +
  scale_y_log10() +
  scale_x_reverse(limits = x_limits, breaks = x_breaks, labels = x_labels) +
  labs(x = "Time", y = "Sampling rates", color = NULL) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(linewidth = 2))) +
  theme(
    legend.position = c(0.83, 0.62),
    legend.text     = element_text(size = base_size * 0.9),
    legend.background = element_blank(),
    legend.key        = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA)
  )

# ---- right column: end observations ----

# (R1) Phylogeny with fossils + occurrences (capture base plot as grob)
phylo_grob <- grid::grid.grabExpr({
  gridGraphics::grid.echo(function() {
    
    # --- kill all base-graphics padding so the plot fills its box ---
    op <- par(
      oma = c(0,0,0,0),
      mar = c(0,0,0,0),
      xaxs = "i", yaxs = "i",     # no 4% expansion
      mgp  = c(0,0,0),
      tcl  = 0,
      plt  = c(0,1,0,1)           # use 100% of the device region
    )
    on.exit(par(op), add = TRUE)
    plot(fossils, tree,
         fossil.col = "orange4", cex = 2,
         extant.col = "transparent", show.axis = F)
  })
})

p_phylo <- ggplot() +
  annotation_custom(phylo_grob, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf) +
  geom_point(aes(x = 1.877, y = 6.2), shape = 21, size = 4.5, stroke = 1.2,
             fill = "white", color = "black") +
  ylim(0,10) +
  scale_x_reverse(limits = c(max_time,0), breaks = x_breaks, labels = x_labels) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(plot.margin = margin(0,0,0,0))

# (R2) Diversification trajectories + initial λ0/μ0, same x axis and uniform y text
ref_right <- data.frame(
  x        = c(max_time, max_time),
  y        = exp(c(-0.5, -1.5)),
  variable = c("Speciation", "Extinction"),
  lab      = c("lambda[0]", "mu[0]")
)

p_rates <- ggplot(combined_rates, aes(
  x = max_time - time,  # present on the right
  y = rate,
  color = variable,
  group = interaction(lineage, variable)
)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.6, lineend = "round") +
  # duplicate circles at present (no legend mapping here)
  geom_point(data = ref_right,
             aes(x = x, y = y),
             inherit.aes = FALSE,
             shape = 21, size = 4.5, stroke = 1.1,
             fill = c("darkgreen","darkred"), color = "black") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Speciation" = "darkgreen",
                                "Extinction" = "darkred"),
                     breaks = c("Speciation","Extinction")) +
  scale_x_reverse(limits = x_limits*1.07, breaks = x_breaks, labels = x_labels) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = y_limits) +
  labs(x = "Time", y = "Diversification rates", color = NULL) +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(linewidth = 2))) +
  theme(
    legend.position = c(0.22, 0.85),   # inside, top-left corner
    legend.justification = c("left", "top"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = base_size * 0.9),
    legend.box.margin = margin(t = -4),
    axis.line.x=element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x=element_blank(),
    axis.text.x=element_blank(),
    axis.title.x=element_blank(),
    axis.line.y=element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y=element_blank(),
    axis.text.y=element_blank(),
    axis.title.y=element_blank())

# (R3) Occurrences jittered, same time axis
occ_df <- data.frame(time = occurrences$hmin,
                     y = stats::rnorm(nrow(occurrences), 0, 0.02))
p_occ <- ggplot(occ_df, aes(x = time, y = y)) +
  geom_point(pch = 20, size = 4, alpha = 0.6, color = "orange3") +
  scale_x_reverse(limits = x_limits, breaks = x_breaks, labels = x_labels) +
  labs(x = "Time", y = "Occurrences") +
  theme(axis.line.y=element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y=element_blank(),
        axis.text.y=element_blank())

# (optional) Make y-label sizes across panels uniform
p_sampling <- p_sampling + theme(axis.title.y = element_text(size = base_size))
p_occ      <- p_occ      + theme(axis.title.y = element_text(size = base_size))

# ---- layout: 3×3 grid ----
left_col  <- plot_grid(p_root, p_init_rates, p_sampling, ncol = 1, rel_heights = c(1, 0.9, 1))
right_col <- plot_grid(p_phylo, p_rates, p_occ,     ncol = 1, rel_heights = c(1, 0.9, 1))

# middle column left blank for spacing/context (or duplicate titles if desired)
# Here we add slim spacers to get a true 3×3 while keeping focus on L/R columns.
spacer <- ggplot() + theme_void()
middle_col <- plot_grid(spacer, spacer, spacer, ncol = 1, rel_heights = c(1,1,1))

final_3x3 <- plot_grid(
  left_col, middle_col, right_col,
  ncol = 3, rel_widths = c(1, 0.08, 1)
)

# optional titles over each column
title_left  <- ggdraw() + draw_label("Starting conditions", fontface = "bold", size = 16)
title_right <- ggdraw() + draw_label("Simulation outcomes", fontface = "bold", size = 16)
titles <- plot_grid(title_left, spacer, title_right, ncol = 3, rel_widths = c(1, 0.08, 1))

final_plot <- plot_grid(titles, final_3x3, ncol = 1, rel_heights = c(0.08, 1))
ggsave("Images/Figure_1_OBDD_process.pdf", final_plot, width = 12, height = 9)
final_plot
```

```{r fig.width=12, fig.asp=0.8, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# ---- wrap a column in a grey box ----
wrap_in_box <- function(plot_obj, fill = "grey95", color = "grey80") {
  ggdraw() +
    # draw background rectangle
    geom_rect(aes(xmin = 0, xmax = 1, ymin = 0, ymax = 1),
              fill = fill, color = color, linewidth = 0.5, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
    # then draw the actual plot on top
    draw_plot(plot_obj)
}

# wrap left and right columns
left_col_box  <- wrap_in_box(left_col)
right_col_box <- wrap_in_box(right_col)

# middle column left blank
spacer <- ggplot() + theme_void()
middle_col <- plot_grid(spacer, spacer, spacer, ncol = 1, rel_heights = c(1,1,1))

# combine
final_3x3 <- plot_grid(
  left_col_box, middle_col, right_col_box,
  ncol = 3, rel_widths = c(1, 0.04, 1)
)

# titles
title_left  <- ggdraw() + draw_label("Starting conditions", fontface = "bold", size = 18)
title_right <- ggdraw() + draw_label("Simulation outcomes", fontface = "bold", size = 18)
titles <- plot_grid(title_left, spacer, title_right, ncol = 3, rel_widths = c(1, 0.08, 1))

final_plot <- plot_grid(titles, final_3x3, ncol = 1, rel_heights = c(0.08, 1))

# ---- output ----
final_plot
```
